---
title: "02 Data Wrangle"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
```

## Import data

```{r}
# Replace extensions if needed after you confirm the real file types
load_raw <- read_excel("data_raw/load.xlsx")
temp_raw <- read_excel("data_raw/temperature.xlsx")
rh_raw   <- read_excel("data_raw/relative_humidity.xlsx")
template <- read_csv("data_raw/submission_template.csv")

glimpse(load_raw)
glimpse(temp_raw)
glimpse(rh_raw)
glimpse(template)
```
